paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 51 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 22 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 30 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. Credit to Ginger Brown, CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522) — cleared all overdue.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 6 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **22 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $19,619 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 3. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Karim Merchant (JOSE-TEST10):** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade.
**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** **15 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $17,481 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $38,503 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $13,522 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Brandy Sexton (CNG2025-508):** **18 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.
**Ginger Brown:** **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

286 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **122 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 8 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$91,396 in payments going out this week** across 38 tasks — make sure funds are available. $20,970 expected in from 1 client payment. Heavy week ahead for Katie Holmes & Sean Springs and Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 4. This needs to turn around today.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 3 overdue — oldest first. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 22 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 28 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Clean — 2 tasks in progress. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. 2 payment tasks need Operations attention. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 47 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 4 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Giselle Garcia: Giselle Garcia has 1 overdue across 1 project with 0 tasks active.

**Brandy Sexton (CNG2025-508):** Clean — 1 tasks in progress. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **18 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 23 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 10 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** **15 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 33 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
